title: Celestisynth
description: A Minecraft mod with celestial weapons and stunning visuals for enhanced gameplay!
body:
![Head of mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afc6d6208ce5b953c6486bbc13f2d5e4d5a55b.png)
![Mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/070e9df66205c3d72e51eb5b3cb4dfa63071b958.png)
![Head of mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afc6d6208ce5b953c6486bbc13f2d5e4d5a55b.png)
![Available versions sticker](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/872712.svg?badge_style=for_the_badge)
![Head of mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afc6d6208ce5b953c6486bbc13f2d5e4d5a55b.png)
🔴 Project Status: CANCELLED (DUE FOR REWRITE)

![bisect](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a05d4489-8b5b-4b56-841b-00c3675282b7.webp)
[https://bisecthosting.com/aqupalooza](https://bisecthosting.com/aqupalooza)

![Head of mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afc6d6208ce5b953c6486bbc13f2d5e4d5a55b.png)
### Some of the weapon's skills are heavily inspired by Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba.
- Revamp your Minecraft experience with Celestisynth! Unleash an arsenal of celestial-grade weapons, forged to perfection and boasting mind-blowing powers. Prepare to be mesmerized as you witness stunning visual effects and a customized player animation that adds a touch of elegance to the gameplay! 
- ⭐ [ New version support: 1.20.1 ! ]
- ⭐ [ New weapon from the recent updates: The Frostbound ! ]

![Celestisynth player skill (Solaris)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3a9c24406597ba990c408dae15c2bbb7b77d2d4.png)
![Head of mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afc6d6208ce5b953c6486bbc13f2d5e4d5a55b.png)
### Important note [1.19.2 and 1.20.1 only]: Celestisynth's Weapons are only craftable using the Celestial Workbench! Use Just Enough Items to guide you!
# ⚔️ Weapon Guide:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Solaris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41999292504070cd09d06bd654f1fcf47846d915.png)
# SOLARIS:
- A flaming sword that can be used for movement and continuous damage.
- Base material can be found in the nether.

![Crescentia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c25ae3dc9dcb7e681b274a5a86fd67efb5476291.png)
# CRESCENTIA
- A shiny sickle that can be used for defensive buffs and continuous damage.
- Base material can be found in caves.

![Breezebreaker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/563b08430a13550c27d51b74eeba4e68dcc38e4d.png)
# BREEZEBREAKER
- A sharp, tall, and slim sword that can be used for movement and burst damage.
- Base material can be found anywhere between Y-100 and Y-320 at the top of high mountains.

![Poltergeist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdc4d5795aad7a81e6f728b4e4ed5eafb49a1548.png)
# POLTERGEIST
- An ominous heavy axe filled with the eyes of ender. Used for massive burst damage.
- Base material mainly consists of the eyes of the ender and can be obtained through crafting.

![Aquaflora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44d0209e3d0c2a14f7581a88f28fe5d587dc4ec0.png)
# AQUAFLORA
- A very light blade with a pointy tip adorned with plants and flowers. Used for area control and continuous damage.
- Base materials mainly consist of plants and flowers that can be found around the overworld.

![Rainfall Serenity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf69378aae6c049606358f67f72c5fdc4e59928c.png)
# RAINFALL SERENITY
- A laser-shooting futuristic longbow that can pierce through targets. Used for damage from long distances.
- Base material can be crafted and brewed through the Crescentia's base material.

![Frostbound](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65d41353d6fe918ef926928713e439f72b2a2dc.png)
# FROSTBOUND
- A shimmering scythe that is seemingly made of ice. Used for area control and balanced damage.
- Base material can be found in caves under cold biomes below Y-Level 60.
  
</details>

![Head of mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afc6d6208ce5b953c6486bbc13f2d5e4d5a55b.png)
# 📖 DEPENDENCIES + INTEGRATION:
## Dependencies:
- [Player Animator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## Integration:
- [Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks): Additional weapon skills (to be expanded upon in future updates, and eventually reworked with the arrival of an upcoming major update!)
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat): Custom weapon attack animations!

![Head of mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afc6d6208ce5b953c6486bbc13f2d5e4d5a55b.png)
# ❓ F.A.Q
### Q. When will you port the mod to [Non-Forge modloader]?
A. Likely not anytime soon, as the mod will be undergoing a couple of major updates in the near future. If you'd like to assist in starting the development process early on, feel free to hit us up on our Discord server!

### Q. When will you port to [Newer version]?
A. When we can. Remember that this is a passion project, but we'll do our best to keep up with version updates!

### Q. When will you backport to [Older version]?
A. Unlikely to happen in the foreseeable future.

### Q. Will there be new content added into the mod?
A. Of course! The mod is constantly receiving new content updates and additional features/mechanics/optimizations! Stick around and see what we have in store!

### Q. When would you implement the new 1.19.2 features to 1.19.4?
A. 1.19.4 and below are all discontinued content-wise, as we'll be focusing on versions 1.20.1+.

![Head of mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9afc6d6208ce5b953c6486bbc13f2d5e4d5a55b.png)
## Extra Credit:
- **KhanTypo**: Helping fix a bug with the recipe book!
- **YeoXuHang**: Assisting in a few parts of the early mod development process!
